Hint:
  stave diagnose --controls testdata/e2e/e2e-33-prefix-missing-evidence/controls --observations testdata/e2e/e2e-33-prefix-missing-evidence/observations

Next steps:
  1. Identify the root cause: `stave diagnose --controls testdata/e2e/e2e-33-prefix-missing-evidence/controls --observations testdata/e2e/e2e-33-prefix-missing-evidence/observations`
  2. View a summary: `stave apply --format text`
  3. Export findings for S3: `stave apply --format json > findings.json`
